description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular main structure and an attached two-car garage on one side. The exterior features numerous large windows, including a prominent grid of windows along one wall, allowing for ample natural light. There is a visible main entrance door and a secondary door, both set within flat, minimally ornamented walls. The rear of the bungalow opens onto a patio area with outdoor furniture, connected by a stepping stone path. The roof is flat, with no visible overhangs or gables, giving the building a modern, streamlined appearance. The overall color scheme is light, with white or pale gray walls and a contrasting blue door.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large grid windows, an attached garage, and a rear patio with outdoor furniture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage doors, and several windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage's depth and a large grid window section.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio area, outdoor furniture, and a secondary entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the flat roof and additional windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grid and grouped windows
